tweaks.description: Bypass Windows 11 setup checks when explicitly selected.
tweaks.intent: Allow Windows Setup to proceed on explicitly selected unsupported hardware.

tweaks.description: Show file extensions and hidden files.
tweaks.intent: Make Explorer friendlier for development by exposing file extensions and hidden files.

tweaks.description: Set Windows PowerShell and PowerShell 7 execution policy to RemoteSigned.
tweaks.intent: Permit locally authored scripts while keeping downloaded scripts signature-gated.

tweaks.description: Enable WSL, Virtual Machine Platform, and OpenSSH Client when selected by the profile.
tweaks.intent: Document optional feature policy that is implemented outside the registry tweak engine.

tweaks.description: Keep Windows Update and servicing enabled.
tweaks.intent: Document the platform guardrail that keeps update and servicing infrastructure enabled.

tweaks.description: Add an elevated Windows Terminal entry to directory context menus.
tweaks.intent: Add a fast elevated terminal entry to directory context menus.

tweaks.description: Show UAC consent prompts without switching to the dimmed secure desktop.
tweaks.intent: Keep UAC consent prompts enabled while avoiding the disruptive screen-dimming secure desktop switch.

tweaks.description: Reduce Edge recommendations, shopping/rewards/wallet noise, first-run prompts, web widgets, image enhancement, sidebar, feedback, and telemetry.
tweaks.intent: Reduce Edge promotional, commerce, telemetry, and sidebar noise for Minimal builds.

tweaks.description: Reduce Edge recommendations, shopping/rewards/wallet noise, first-run prompts, feedback, and telemetry while preserving Copilot/sidebar, web widgets, and image enhancement.
tweaks.intent: Reduce Edge promotional, commerce, and telemetry noise while preserving Copilot+ sidebar capabilities.

tweaks.description: Dual boot: disable Fast Startup, prevent automatic BitLocker device encryption, and disable WPBT execution.
tweaks.intent: Avoid dual-boot friction from Fast Startup, surprise device encryption, and firmware payload injection.

tweaks.description: Remove OneDrive integration, block sync/reinstall policies, hide Explorer namespace, and force known folders back to local user-profile paths.
tweaks.intent: Remove OneDrive pressure and keep known folders local for new users.

tweaks.description: Disable Xbox Game Bar and GameDVR capture prompts.
tweaks.intent: Suppress Game Bar capture prompts and GameDVR recording defaults.

tweaks.description: Enable Windows Developer Mode: symlinks without UAC elevation, app sideloading.
tweaks.intent: Enable Windows Developer Mode features expected by developer workstations.
